title: 'Unknown Object Closing In': NASA Astronauts First UFO Scare On Cam? Gemini 7 Crew & A ‘Bogey’ Call
description: "We have a bogey." Newly declassified Pentagon files have brought a 60-year-old space mystery back to life. During the 1965 Gemini 7 mission, astronauts Frank Borman and Jim Lovell reported a "brilliant body" shadowed by trillions of particles. Despite Houston claiming it was just their own booster rocket, the crew insisted they were seeing something else. Now, with 162 unsealed UAP files released to the public, the world is finally hearing the full story of what NASA's pioneers saw in the void.

title: Russian soldiers 'turned to stone' by aliens after 'shooting down UFO'
description: A declassified CIA file has shed light on a strange alleged encounter.

title: This “UFO” ETF Is Among the Few Real Ways To Invest In The Space Economy
description: If you have ever tried to buy “space exposure” through an ETF, you have probably noticed the same trick. Most space funds quietly fill the bucket with Boeing (NYSE:BA), Lockheed Martin (NYSE:LMT), and Honeywell (NASDAQ:HON), then call it a day. You end up with aerospace primes when what you wanted was the companies actually launching rockets and beaming ... This “UFO” ETF Is Among the Few Real Ways To Invest In The Space Economy
